principles: Discover supported metrics, VM sizes, SKU capabilities, prices, and current runtime state dynamically before applying rules.
Use Azure Cost Management actual cost as the primary current-cost signal.
Use Azure Retail Prices API for target VM size, reservation, savings plan, Spot, and operating system price comparison.
Use Resource SKUs and available resize APIs to enumerate valid target sizes instead of hardcoding VM families.
Prefer the best valid production target, not just the next smaller or larger VM size.
Never recommend a cheaper target that violates production CPU, memory, disk, network, availability, security, or licensing constraints.

lowCallCollectionPlan.goal: Collect VM properties, metrics, cost, price, and resize data with the fewest REST calls while preserving recommendation quality.
callReductionPrinciples: Use subscription or resource-group list APIs instead of one GET per VM.
Use instanceView expansion only in deep mode or for candidate VMs that need runtime, patch, agent, or health details.
Cache metric definitions by resource type, location, namespace, and API version.
Fetch multiple VM metric names in one Azure Monitor metrics request using comma-separated metricnames.
Fetch Resource SKUs once per region and cache capabilities for all VMs in that region.
Call available resize targets only for VMs that are actual resize candidates.
Use Cost Management grouped by ResourceId once per scope instead of querying cost per VM.
Use Retail Prices once per region and VM meter group, cache paged results, and reuse for all VMs in that region.
Join NIC, NSG, public IP, disk, backup, or policy resources only when a recommendation needs that context.

derivedMetrics.p95NetworkInMbps: p95(Network In Total bytes per minute * 8 / 60 / 1000000)
derivedMetrics.p95NetworkOutMbps: p95(Network Out Total bytes per minute * 8 / 60 / 1000000)
derivedMetrics.p95DiskReadIops: p95(OS Disk Read Operations/Sec + sum(Data Disk Read Operations/Sec by LUN))
derivedMetrics.p95DiskWriteIops: p95(OS Disk Write Operations/Sec + sum(Data Disk Write Operations/Sec by LUN))
derivedMetrics.p95DiskReadMBps: p95((OS Disk Read Bytes/sec + sum(Data Disk Read Bytes/sec by LUN)) / 1048576)
derivedMetrics.p95DiskWriteMBps: p95((OS Disk Write Bytes/sec + sum(Data Disk Write Bytes/sec by LUN)) / 1048576)

requiredProductionFilters: target VM size must be available in the VM region and subscription
target VM size must be a valid resize target or migration target
target VM size must satisfy p99 CPU demand plus production buffer
target VM size must satisfy memory demand plus production buffer
target VM size must satisfy observed network throughput and flow requirements
target VM size must satisfy cached and uncached disk IOPS and bandwidth requirements
target VM size must support required data disk count and data disk size limits

target option must not weaken required security posture

condition.pythonExpression: get_value(resource, 'signals.idleDays') gte 30 and get_value(resource, 'signals.productionCritical') neq True

recommendationRules.recommendation: Stop, deallocate, schedule shutdown, or delete the VM after owner validation.
recommendationRules.bestActionLogic: If disk and state retention are required, deallocate. If recovery is required but runtime is not, snapshot or backup attached disks and delete. For productionCritical, require explicit approval.
recommendationRules.conditionDescription: idleDays >= configuredIdleThreshold AND productionCritical != true

condition.pythonExpression: get_value(resource, 'signals.p95CpuPct') lt 40 and get_value(resource, 'signals.avgAvailableMemoryPct') gt 40 and get_value(resource, 'signals.p95DiskConsumedPct') lt 40 and get_value(resource, 'signals.p95NetworkUtilizationPct') lt 40

recommendationRules.recommendation: Resize to the cheapest valid VM size that satisfies CPU, memory, disk, network, feature, availability, and security requirements with production buffer.
recommendationRules.bestActionLogic: Enumerate available resize targets and same-family or newer-generation alternatives. Filter by production constraints. Score by actual cost, retail price, headroom, reliability, security, and migration risk.
recommendationRules.conditionDescription: p95CpuPct < 40 AND avgAvailableMemoryPct > 40 AND disk and network utilization are below 40% for 14-30 days

condition.pythonExpression: get_value(resource, 'signals.p95CpuPct') gte 80 or get_value(resource, 'signals.p99CpuPct') gte 90

recommendationRules.recommendation: Resize to a VM with sufficient vCPU performance, or scale out if workload supports horizontal scaling.
recommendationRules.bestActionLogic: Choose scale out for stateless or load-balanced workloads; choose resize for stateful single-instance workloads. Prefer newer generation SKUs when price/performance is better.
recommendationRules.conditionDescription: p95CpuPct > 80 OR p99CpuPct > 90

condition.pythonExpression: get_value(resource, 'signals.p05AvailableMemoryPct') lte 10 or get_value(resource, 'signals.minAvailableMemoryPct') lte 5

recommendationRules.recommendation: Resize to a memory-optimized or higher-memory VM size.
recommendationRules.bestActionLogic: Select target by required memory plus buffer before CPU. Avoid downsizing when memory metrics are unavailable.
recommendationRules.conditionDescription: p05AvailableMemoryPct < 10 OR minAvailableMemoryPct < 5

condition.pythonExpression: get_value(resource, 'properties.vmSizeFamily') eq 'B' and get_value(resource, 'signals.p05CpuCreditsRemaining') lte 10

recommendationRules.recommendation: Move from burstable B-series to a non-burstable VM or larger B-series if sustained CPU demand is expected.
recommendationRules.bestActionLogic: If CPU spikes are rare and credits recover, keep B-series. If credits frequently drain, choose a non-burstable general-purpose target.
recommendationRules.conditionDescription: vmSize starts with 'Standard_B' AND p05(CPU Credits Remaining) <= threshold

condition.pythonExpression: get_value(resource, 'signals.nonBurstableVm') eq True and get_value(resource, 'signals.p95CpuPct') lt 30 and get_value(resource, 'signals.workloadToleratesBurstable') eq True

recommendationRules.recommendation: Evaluate B-series only for non-critical, low-average CPU workloads where credit depletion risk is acceptable.
recommendationRules.bestActionLogic: Do not recommend B-series for latency-sensitive or sustained production CPU workloads.
recommendationRules.conditionDescription: nonBurstableVm == true AND p95CpuPct is low AND workload is tolerant of burstable CPU

condition.pythonExpression: get_value(resource, 'signals.p95VmCachedIopsConsumedPct') gte 80 or get_value(resource, 'signals.p95VmUncachedIopsConsumedPct') gte 80 or get_value(resource, 'signals.p95VmCachedBandwidthConsumedPct') gte 80 or get_value(resource, 'signals.p95VmUncachedBandwidthConsumedPct') gte 80

recommendationRules.recommendation: Resize VM to a size with higher cached or uncached disk limits, adjust disk caching, or change disk tier.
recommendationRules.bestActionLogic: If VM saturation metrics are high, include VM resize in the recommendation. Do not recommend only disk upgrade when VM-level storage limit is the bottleneck.
recommendationRules.conditionDescription: p95VmCachedIopsConsumedPct > 80 OR p95VmUncachedIopsConsumedPct > 80 OR p95VmCachedBandwidthConsumedPct > 80 OR p95VmUncachedBandwidthConsumedPct > 80

condition.pythonExpression: get_value(resource, 'signals.p95OsDiskLatencyMs') gte 20 or get_value(resource, 'signals.p95DataDiskLatencyMs') gte 20 or get_value(resource, 'signals.p95DiskQueueDepth') gte 2

recommendationRules.recommendation: Investigate disk tier, VM storage limits, host caching, application IO pattern, and disk striping or Premium SSD v2/Ultra options.
recommendationRules.bestActionLogic: Use latency and queue depth with disk consumed percentage to identify disk, VM, or application bottleneck.
recommendationRules.conditionDescription: p95OsDiskLatencyMs or p95DataDiskLatencyMsByLun exceeds workload threshold OR queue depth is sustained

condition.pythonExpression: get_value(resource, 'signals.p95NetworkInUtilizationPct') gte 80 or get_value(resource, 'signals.p95NetworkOutUtilizationPct') gte 80 or get_value(resource, 'signals.flowLimitUtilizationPct') gte 80

recommendationRules.recommendation: Resize to a VM with higher network bandwidth or connection limits, enable accelerated networking when supported, or scale out.
recommendationRules.bestActionLogic: Choose scale out for distributed services; choose larger network-optimized VM for single-node bottlenecks.
recommendationRules.conditionDescription: p95NetworkInMbps or p95NetworkOutMbps approaches target VM network capability OR flow metrics approach limits

condition.pythonExpression: get_value(resource, 'signals.olderGenerationVm') eq True and get_value(resource, 'signals.newerGenerationBetterPricePerformance') eq True

recommendationRules.recommendation: Migrate to newer generation VM size after compatibility validation.
recommendationRules.bestActionLogic: Compare retail and actual price, vCPU, memory, storage limits, network limits, architecture, region availability, and migration risk.
recommendationRules.conditionDescription: current VM is older generation and newer generation with compatible features has better price/performance

condition.pythonExpression: get_value(resource, 'signals.steadyUsage') eq True and get_value(resource, 'signals.expectedLifetimeDays') gte 365

recommendationRules.recommendation: Evaluate Reserved VM Instances or Azure savings plan.
recommendationRules.bestActionLogic: Use actual cost and retail reservation or savings plan pricing. Prefer reservations for stable VM family and region. Prefer savings plan for flexible compute usage.
recommendationRules.conditionDescription: runtime is steady AND expectedLifetimeDays >= 365 AND workload is not Spot-only

condition.pythonExpression: get_value(resource, 'signals.workloadInterruptible') eq True and get_value(resource, 'signals.statefulProduction') neq True

recommendationRules.recommendation: Evaluate Azure Spot VM with eviction handling.
recommendationRules.bestActionLogic: Recommend Spot only for interruptible batch, CI, rendering, fault-tolerant workers, or stateless workloads with retry logic.
recommendationRules.conditionDescription: workloadInterruptible == true AND statefulProduction != true

condition.pythonExpression: get_value(resource, 'signals.productionCritical') eq True and get_value(resource, 'signals.hasHaArchitecture') neq True

recommendationRules.recommendation: Use availability zones, availability sets, VM scale sets, load balancing, or application-level failover.
recommendationRules.bestActionLogic: Prefer zone-redundant or multi-zone architecture for critical workloads where region supports it.
recommendationRules.conditionDescription: productionCritical == true AND no zone, availability set, scale set, or HA architecture is detected

condition.pythonExpression: get_value(resource, 'signals.availabilityScore') lt 99.9

recommendationRules.recommendation: Investigate platform availability, guest health, boot diagnostics, extension failures, and HA design.
recommendationRules.bestActionLogic: Combine availability metric with instanceView statuses and activity logs.
recommendationRules.conditionDescription: VmAvailabilityMetric indicates recurring unavailable states

condition.pythonExpression: get_value(resource, 'signals.criticalPatchesAvailable') eq True or get_value(resource, 'signals.lastPatchInstallationFailed') eq True

recommendationRules.recommendation: Enable or repair guest patching and schedule production-safe patch windows.
recommendationRules.bestActionLogic: Use instanceView patchStatus when available and combine with Azure Update Manager or policy state.
recommendationRules.conditionDescription: patch assessment shows critical/security patches available OR last patch installation failed

condition.pythonExpression: get_value(resource, 'properties.osType') eq 'Linux' and get_value(resource, 'properties.linuxDisablePasswordAuthentication') neq True

recommendationRules.recommendation: Disable SSH password authentication and require SSH keys or managed access.
recommendationRules.bestActionLogic: Validate operational access path before enforcing.
recommendationRules.conditionDescription: osType == 'Linux' AND linuxConfiguration.disablePasswordAuthentication != true

condition.pythonExpression: get_value(resource, 'policy.requiresTrustedLaunch') eq True and get_value(resource, 'properties.securityType') neq 'TrustedLaunch'

recommendationRules.recommendation: Use Trusted Launch with secure boot and vTPM where supported.
recommendationRules.bestActionLogic: Recommend only when target size, image, and OS support Trusted Launch.
recommendationRules.conditionDescription: policy.requiresTrustedLaunch == true AND securityProfile.securityType != 'TrustedLaunch'

condition.pythonExpression: get_value(resource, 'policy.requiresConfidentialCompute') eq True and get_value(resource, 'signals.confidentialComputeEnabled') neq True

recommendationRules.recommendation: Migrate to a Confidential VM compatible size and disk security profile.
recommendationRules.bestActionLogic: Check region, image, VM family, OS, disk encryption, and application compatibility.
recommendationRules.conditionDescription: policy.requiresConfidentialCompute == true AND securityProfile.securityType is not confidential

condition.pythonExpression: get_value(resource, 'policy.requiresEncryptionAtHost') eq True and get_value(resource, 'properties.encryptionAtHost') neq True

recommendationRules.recommendation: Enable encryption at host where supported.
recommendationRules.bestActionLogic: Validate VM size support and maintenance impact before change.
recommendationRules.conditionDescription: policy.requiresEncryptionAtHost == true AND securityProfile.encryptionAtHost != true

condition.pythonExpression: get_value(resource, 'signals.publicExposure') eq True

recommendationRules.recommendation: Remove public IP where possible, restrict inbound rules, use Bastion, VPN, private endpoints, or Just-in-Time access.
recommendationRules.bestActionLogic: Requires joining VM NIC, public IP, NSG, and route data from Network APIs.
recommendationRules.conditionDescription: attached NIC has public IP or broad inbound NSG exposure

condition.pythonExpression: get_value(resource, 'properties.osDiskDeleteOption') eq 'Detach' or get_value(resource, 'signals.dataDiskDeleteOptionDetachCount') gt 0

recommendationRules.recommendation: Review delete options to avoid orphaned disks after VM deletion.
recommendationRules.bestActionLogic: Use Detach for production retention requirements; use Delete for disposable workloads.
recommendationRules.conditionDescription: osDisk.deleteOption == 'Detach' OR dataDisks[].deleteOption == 'Detach'

condition.pythonExpression: get_value(resource, 'signals.hybridBenefitEligible') eq True and get_value(resource, 'signals.hybridBenefitApplied') neq True

recommendationRules.recommendation: Evaluate Azure Hybrid Benefit for eligible Windows Server or SQL Server licenses.
recommendationRules.bestActionLogic: Recommend only when licensing entitlement is confirmed.
recommendationRules.conditionDescription: Windows or SQL workload and eligible hybrid benefit is not applied

selectionAlgorithm: Get current VM model and instance view.
Discover metric definitions for the VM resource.
Fetch all relevant supported metrics for the production lookback window.
Calculate CPU, memory, disk, network, availability, and burst-credit demand percentiles.
Fetch attached disks, NICs, public IPs, NSGs, load balancer membership, and availability context when available.
Fetch current actual VM cost from Cost Management.
Fetch Resource SKUs and available resize targets for the VM region.
Fetch retail prices for candidate VM sizes, operating system meters, reservations, savings plan, and Spot where applicable.
Build candidate targets from available resize targets and compatible migration families.
Remove candidates that fail production filters.
Score remaining candidates using configured weights.
Return the highest-scoring recommendation with reason, expected impact, risk, rollback notes, and required validation.

bestRecommendation.action: resize | migrate | scale_out | reserve | savings_plan | spot | schedule | stop_deallocate | delete | secure | no_action

knownLimitations: Azure Monitor VM platform metrics may not include every guest OS or application-level signal required for final sizing decisions.

Filesystem utilization, process-level CPU, application latency, database wait stats, and service-level SLOs require guest agents, VM Insights, Log Analytics, application telemetry, or workload-native metrics.
Memory metrics availability can depend on VM agent and metric support; avoid memory-based downsizing if memory data is missing.
Retail prices are public prices and may not reflect enterprise discounts, credits, negotiated rates, or existing benefits; actual cost should come from Cost Management.
A valid resize target can still require downtime, quota, capacity, compatibility, or maintenance-window validation.
Security recommendations often require joining related resources such as NICs, NSGs, public IPs, Key Vault, Defender for Cloud, Azure Policy, and Update Manager.

conditionLanguage.fieldPathRoot: normalized DB resource record passed to analyzer
conditionLanguage.unknownHandling: return investigate or cap classification; never mark stay/best from missing required data

classificationLevels.meaning: Already optimized or only minor optional improvements remain.
Generally healthy with low-risk optimization opportunities.
Needs review; measurable cost, performance, reliability, security, or governance risk exists.
Action recommended; resource is materially over-costed, underperforming, risky, or non-compliant.
Immediate action recommended; high waste, outage risk, security exposure, or compliance risk.

evaluationOrder: apply best conditions only when no warning or worst condition matched
apply scoring caps for missing data, security findings, reliability findings, and unknown ownership
return score, classification, matchedConditions, and deterministicRecommendations
notes: Do not parse recommendationRules.condition at runtime; those are descriptive only.
Python assessment must use pythonAssessment.deterministicCases plus normalized metrics/signals.
All runtime decisions must be reproducible from input JSON and this file.

runtimeContract.ruleSignalConvention: signals.rules.<recommendationRule.id> == true triggers that recommendation rule
collectorResponsibility: Collect Azure resource properties, Azure Monitor metrics, Cost Management rows, price cache, tags, policy, and advisor data outside recommendation runtime.
Store normalized values in the database using the roots resource, properties, metrics, cost, prices, tags, policy, advisor, and signals.
Calculate derived signals deterministically from stored DB values where raw metrics/properties need aggregation.
Do not require the analyzer to call Azure REST APIs while producing recommendations.
analyzerResponsibility: Load the resource assessment JSON by resourceType.
Load the normalized resource record from the database.
Evaluate rule condition groups with supported operators only.
Return matched outputs including recommendationAction/actionOutcome, message, severity, pillar, resultCode, and evidence.

analyzerContract.purpose: FastAPI/backend analyzer loads this JSON as deterministic optimization rules and evaluates them against metrics/properties/cost already stored in the database.

normalizedInputRecord.resource: identity and inventory fields such as id, name, type, subscriptionId, resourceGroup, location, sku, kind, tags, and lifecycle timestamps
normalizedInputRecord.properties: latest ARM/Resource Graph properties stored by collector
normalizedInputRecord.metrics: Azure Monitor metric aggregates stored by collector; expected aggregate suffixes include Avg, Min, Max, P50, P90, P95, P99, Count, Total, TrendPct, and WindowDays where available
normalizedInputRecord.cost: Cost Management actual/amortized/forecast rows normalized by resourceId, meter, skuName, product, chargeType, pricingModel, reservation/savings-plan coverage, and period totals
normalizedInputRecord.prices: optional Retail Prices/API or internal price cache for candidate comparison
normalizedInputRecord.policy: environment, production flag, criticality, required baseline, business hours, retention, and compliance requirements
normalizedInputRecord.signals: derived booleans/numbers calculated by collector/analyzer from DB metrics, properties, cost, and policy

conditionEvaluation.numericComparisonBehavior: compare only when stored value is numeric; otherwise rule_not_applicable
conditionEvaluation.stringComparisonBehavior: case_insensitive for contains/in/not_in when analyzer normalizes strings
conditionEvaluation.arrayComparisonBehavior: contains checks scalar membership or substring membership depending on stored value type
conditionEvaluation.booleanComparisonBehavior: accept true/false booleans; analyzer may normalize string booleans before evaluation

evaluationOrder: load resource-specific assessment file by resourceType
read one normalized resource record from DB with resource/properties/metrics/cost/tags/policy/signals/prices/advisor roots
evaluate data completeness and missing-cost rules
evaluate stop_or_delete rules before resize rules
evaluate upgrade rules before downgrade when both saturation and low-utilization signals conflict
evaluate stay rules only when no higher-priority action matched
return matched rule outputs with recommendationAction/actionOutcome and evidence paths

outputContract.actionFieldMeaning: normalized machine action outcome, one of stay/downgrade/upgrade/stop_or_delete/investigate

best_unapproved_region.title: Plan migration to approved Canada region

currentState.description: Resource runs in an unapproved or unclassified Azure region.

proposedState.description: Deploy equivalent workload in canadacentral (primary) or canadaeast (DR). Service Bus namespaces require recreation — update connection strings and cut over.

best_unapproved_region.blastRadius: Regional migration; may require dual-run cutover
prerequisites: Confirm organizational region policy with platform team
Validate paired-region DR requirements
Plan connection string and DNS updates for dependents

costImpact.description: Cost may change by region; prioritize compliance and latency over savings.

performanceImpact.before: Latency and throughput depend on current region placement.

reliabilityImpact.after: Aligns with Canada Central / Canada East pairing for DR.
